overall.description: First-person exploration of a deserted industrial complex at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player approaches a building with red warning signage, passes it, and continues through an area with solar arrays and large storage tanks. The atmosphere is dark and moody with artificial lighting from the industrial structures against a teal night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial approach road with distant solar arrays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the illuminated industrial complex in the distance

entered.detail: large dark industrial structure with illuminated windows on the left side of the path
long structure with angled translucent panels glowing with white light in the distance
concrete building with two large red triangular warning signs visible ahead
metal fencing running along the right side of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a deserted dirt path toward a distant industrial complex at night. An industrial warehouse with illuminated windows sits to the left while solar array structures glow white in the center distance. A building with red warning triangles becomes progressively visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial checkpoint building with hazard signage and overhead power lines

events.description: approaches close to the TECHNICA building with large red warning triangles, revealing signage
turns left at the intersection to follow the road past the TECHNICA building

agents.ego_description: approaching the TECHNICA building to examine the warning signage before turning left to continue exploration

entered.detail: thick electrical cables stretching across the sky above the path
illuminated red sign visible in the far distance on the left
low industrial buildings with corrugated metal roofs on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: Passing close by the TECHNICA building with its prominent red warning triangles and illuminated signage. Overhead power lines become visible against the night sky. The camera turns left at the intersection, leaving the building behind while industrial sheds appear on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage yard with solar arrays and chemical tanks

events.description: large cylindrical chemical storage tanks come into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the industrial yard past solar arrays and approaching large storage tanks

entered.detail: massive cylindrical white storage tanks with metal staircases and piping
thick metal pipes running along the ground near the storage tanks

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the industrial complex along an asphalt path, passing between solar panel arrays on the left and industrial sheds on the right. Large cylindrical storage tanks appear on the left side as the path continues through the deserted facility, with industrial piping becoming visible near the tanks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a deserted path that leads from the outskirts of a dark industrial complex into its dense interior. It begins on a dirt road moving toward a distant warehouse and glowing white solar arrays, as a building marked with red warning triangles gradually emerges ahead. As the camera passes close to the Technica building and its illuminated signage, overhead power lines cut across the teal night sky before the view turns left at an intersection. The scene then shifts from the dirt path to an asphalt road, moving deeper into the facility between solar panel arrays and distant industrial sheds. Finally, the perspective glides past large cylindrical storage tanks and intricate industrial piping, fully immersing the viewer in the deserted complex.
